---
applyTo: '/Users/daniel_molina/Downloads/Python/Python/**'
---

For all coding exercises in this project, when the user says an exercise is done, always:
- Review and provide feedback by directly analyzing the code in the relevant file.
- Provide focused, constructive feedback and suggestions based on the code as written, referencing only as much of the code as needed for clarity (for example, show a code snippet only for pointing out specific suggestions, errors, or improvements).
- Do NOT repeat or display the full code in the chat by default; only do so for pinpointed explanations or technical reasons.

This review approach should be followed automatically for all future relevant coding review requests in this project, unless instructed otherwise.

Review should be efficient, actionable, and respect user preference to not clutter the chat with repeated code already visible in their own editor.
